meaning: n.受奉献者(尤指书籍的受奉献者)
examples: Hari, of course, is the presiding spirit of the book, and naturally the dedicatee.
Dedicatee Yourself to Serving Others — the starting point of all personal success and how to beg in.
Whether the dedicatee could really manage these works was, I think, a matter of some indifference to him.
